test.command: uv run pytest -m "not integration_local and not integration_provider" -x -q

typecheck.observation: 107 warnings (all non-blocking type warnings in test files), zero errors. Exit code 0.

appliedUpdates.description: Add optimization.md to .factory/library/ documenting the GEPA evaluator protocol, optimization runtime architecture (BudgetConfig, StopCondition, ParetoFront, OptimizationRunner), checkpoint format, and how to extend with custom evaluators/target types.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the module structure guidance to clarify that domain groupings (e.g., optimization/) are acceptable as shallow subpackages. Current guidance says 'No deeply nested packages' which is ambiguous — optimization/ is only 2 levels deep and follows a natural domain grouping.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/grist_mill/optimization/ contains evaluator_adapter.py and runtime.py as a domain subpackage. AGENTS.md says 'Flat module structure under src/grist_mill/. No deeply nested packages.' Workers have been using this pattern correctly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the backend-worker SKILL.md step 7 to say 'uv run ty check src/grist_mill/' instead of 'uv run ty check .'. The current instruction conflicts with AGENTS.md which explicitly states that ty check on the full repo will fail due to legacy code in bench/, scripts/, optimization/, and task_generator/.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers across milestones (m5-cross-optimization-consistency, m5-optimization-runtime) correctly scoped type checking to src/grist_mill/ per AGENTS.md, but the skill file still says 'uv run ty check .'. This discrepancy could confuse future workers into running the wrong command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refactor the test_grist_mill command to use pytest markers or discovery patterns instead of listing 28+ individual test files on a single line. This pattern is growing with each new test file and becoming unmaintainable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three reviewers flagged that .factory/services.yaml test_grist_mill is an ever-growing single-line list of file paths. Each new feature appends to this list. A marker-based approach (e.g., pytest -m grist_mill) would be more scalable.

rejectedObservations.observation: Move 'import inspect' to module top level in evaluator_adapter.py
rejectedObservations.reason: Stylistic preference; lazy import is a valid pattern and has no functional impact.

rejectedObservations.observation: Combine ObjectiveFunction.create() registry dicts to reduce duplication
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor code style issue; the current two-dict pattern provides clear separation between validated and default configs.
MockProposer is test-only infrastructure; minor signature differences don't affect production code.

rejectedObservations.observation: Merge TargetType and TargetConfig to reduce duplication
rejectedObservations.reason: Design decision — these serve different purposes (configuration vs runtime type) and having them separate aids clarity.
